artifacts.summary: Complete analysis of dense representation theorem wiring strategy. Key finding: truth lemma gap over TimelineQuot. Resolution: build BFMCS indexed by TimelineQuot with forward_F/backward_P temporal coherence, then port truth lemma structure. Estimated 7-11 hours implementation.

existing_infrastructure: DenseTask and DenseTaskFrame (Task 16) - complete and sorry-free
gaps_identified: Truth lemma proven for D=Int, needed for D=TimelineQuot
findings.resolution_strategy: Build BFMCS indexed by TimelineQuot using existing linking infrastructure. Port canonical_truth_lemma structure to TimelineQuot domain.
findings.risk_assessment: Low risk for DenseTask/algebraic infrastructure; medium risk for temporal coherence; high risk mitigated by using forward-only truth lemma
